title: Textures Simplified (Discontinued)
description: Simplifies Minecraft textures to a maximum of 5 - 3 colors.
body: --- Textures Simplified reduces Minecraft’s visuals to their purest form. Each texture is recreated using only 3 to 5 colors, giving the game a clean, minimal, and cohesive look. The result is a lightweight pack that smooths out visual noise while keeping every block and item instantly recognizable. Perfect for players who appreciate simplicity, clarity, and a modern pixel-art style. ---
